summary:
Serum ferritin test detects early signs of iron deficiency due to acting as a marker for stored iron reserves before symptoms appear; comprehensive medical guidance supports using multiple parameters including ferritin during prenatal care screening processes.
The summary accurately captures Agent1’s rationale while adhering strictly within your specified constraints regarding length and focus on critical aspects pertinent to identifying which diagnostic
